name: Hang up Street
short_description: Build your vocational academy to turn adventurers into your idle heroes, liven up the deserted streets, and advance the levels together!
detailed_description:
Welcome to "Hook Street"! This is a 2D side-scrolling game. Here, players will purchase vocational academies to attract adventurers, gradually make the deserted streets lively and fight against powerful monster lairs!

Game features:

Multiple vocational academies: Expand academies of different vocations on the streets to attract more adventurers and unlock rich vocational routes.

Automatic on-hook combat: Heroes automatically move, change jobs, and fight, allowing you to experience a relaxing and enjoyable on-hook gameplay.

Multi-level monster lair: There are many kinds of monsters waiting in the lair on the right, and each level is more challenging. Rich forging system: dozens of equipment recipes, random entry attributes.

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English*, Japanese*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
